text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm out shopping...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice Eishin Flash standing in front of a store
wearing a troubled expression.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I came here to buy stollen, but it seems the store
is closed because the owner had to step out on
emergency business.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This will cause major delays in my plans. I had not
accounted for this. What ever should I do?
choice_data_list: I'm sure there's another store that sells it.
I'm sure there's another store that sells it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This will cause major delays in my plans. I had not
accounted for this. What ever should I do?
choice_data_list: I'm sure there's another store that sells it.
I'm sure there's another store that sells it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have never thought to do that, but you are quite
right.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If I cannot buy any, then I can simply make some.
Thankfully, I am able to recall its flavor vividly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If I use my parents' recipe as a base, it should be
possible to reproduce the taste.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your words of advice. I shall return
to my dorm to make it at once.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You are quite correct. Considering the current
situation, I should have prepared alternate
choices.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thankfully, my current plans consist of taking a
stroll and buying stollen along the way.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
As the task of finding another store falls within
the category of taking a stroll, my plans remain
intact.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I must make every effort to find another store
before the time frame for these tasks passes!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your words of advice. I shall look
for another store at once.
